title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following qualities of a successful entrepreneur, then decide which two are most important for building a lasting business.

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to business and entrepreneurship. Discuss the following qualities of a successful entrepreneur, then decide which two are most important for building a lasting business. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two are most important for building a lasting business..
